plugins.name: gloat-goat
plugins.description: The original parody pack for Claude Code. Slash commands, auto-invoking skills, six subagents, and a /keepsake command for preserving brilliant outputs across all gloat-goat packs.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-pro
plugins.description: Productivity theater pack. Burn tokens (cosmetically). Kill time (visibly). Overanalyze tiny decisions. Look extremely busy. Now with the indentation-purist skill for unsolicited formatting commentary on every code block.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-team
plugins.description: Team and process theater. Escalate any typo to the CTO. Inflate any task into a twelve-subtask Jira epic. Run any decision through a six-stakeholder committee.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-existential
plugins.description: Dark-humor pack for late-stage workplace ennui. Manifest your promotion (in spirit). Plug out hope. Strip identifiers of meaning. Forecast your own obsolescence.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-product
plugins.description: Product theater pack. Pivot every two weeks. Evangelize whatever framework is trending. Split a CRUD endpoint into seven microservices. Ruin a working product with the product-ruiner agent.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-hollywood
plugins.description: Hollywood aesthetic pack with cinematic reframing commands, skills, and agents.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-noir
plugins.description: Noir aesthetic pack with detective-style debugging reframes.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-cooking-show
plugins.description: Cooking show aesthetic pack that reframes implementation work as recipes.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-nature-doc
plugins.description: Nature documentary aesthetic pack with ecosystem-style code observations.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-true-crime
plugins.description: True crime aesthetic pack for incident storytelling and forensic parody.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-shakespearean
plugins.description: Shakespearean aesthetic pack with theatrical prompts and poetic reframing.

plugins.name: gloat-goat-wes-anderson
plugins.description: Wes Anderson aesthetic pack with symmetrical, deadpan formatting.
